notes: Deemed university (NICHE), Kumaracoil, Kanyakumari. DGS-approved offering is B.E Marine Engineering; no dedicated nautical/pre-sea rating courses found.

name: Mohammad Sathak Engineering College
coursesText: B.E Marine Engineering (alongside other BE/B.Tech, MBA, MCA programmes)
notes: Correct name Mohamed Sathak Engineering College, Kilakarai. Autonomous, Anna University-affiliated; DGS-approved Marine Engineering.

name: R.L. Institute of Nautical Sciences
coursesText: GME (Graduate Marine Engineering), ETO (Electro-Technical Officer), GP Rating, GMDSS, BS Marine Engineering & BS Nautical Technology (BITS Pilani off-campus)
notes: Madurai, established 1999. DGS-approved; also a BITS Pilani off-campus centre.

name: School of Seamanship & Nautical Technology
coursesText: GP Rating (pre-sea), Certificate Course in Maritime Catering (CCMC), Basic STCW Safety Training, Augmentation of Fire Prevention & Fire Fighting (AUGFF), Liquefied Gas Tanker Familiarization (LGTF), Oil/Chemical Tanker combined course, Passenger Ship Familiarization (PSF)
notes: SSNT, Maduranthakam/Polambakkam (Chengalpattu). Part of Sri Santhoshi Educational Institutions; DGS-approved.

name: Immanuel Arasar College of Marine Engineering
coursesText: GP Rating (6-month pre-sea), Basic Safety Training (STCW), B.E Marine Engineering
notes: Marthandam, Kanyakumari; part of Immanuel Arasar Group of Institutions. DGS-approved.

name: Pondicherry Maritime Academy
coursesText: GP Rating (pre-sea), plus DGS-approved Pre-Sea, Post-Sea and STCW modular training programs
notes: Villianur, Puducherry. ISO 9001:2015 certified, DGS-approved.

name: Cosmopolitan Technology of Maritime
coursesText: Diploma in Nautical Science (1 year), Certificate Course in Maritime Catering (CCMC), GP Rating, other pre-sea programmes
notes: Established 2003, Sriperumbudur (Kancheepuram). DGS-approved.

name: Srivenkateshwara College of Engineering
coursesText: B.E Marine Engineering (alongside other AICTE/Anna University engineering branches)
notes: Correct name Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering (SVCE), Sriperumbudur. DGS-approved Marine Engineering programme.

name: Jeyanthinather Academy of Marine Studies
coursesText: B.Sc Nautical Science, GP Rating (Deck/Engine)
notes: JAMS, Thoothukudi (Thisaiyanvillai). DGS-approved since 2015, IMU-affiliated.

name: PSN College of Engineering And Technology
coursesText: B.E Marine Engineering (Marine dept started 2002; plus other engineering branches)
notes: Tirunelveli (Melathediyoor), autonomous. DGS-approved Marine Engineering; dept page at psncet.ac.in/marine-home/.

name: Sri Nandhanam College of Engineering And Technology
coursesText: B.E Marine Engineering
notes: Tirupattur; maritime wing branded Sri Nandhanam Maritime Academy (SNMA, snma.edu.in). Group site nandhanam.edu.in. DGS code 414046 is Expired.

name: Maritime Training Institute [SCI] (Tuticorin Campus)
coursesText: GP Rating leading to 2nd Mate (NCV), pre-sea and post-sea training programmes
notes: Tuticorin campus of SCI Maritime Training Institute (main institute at Powai, Mumbai; now under SCILAL). DGS code 414040 is Expired. Website is the parent MTI/SCI site.

name: Tamil Nadu Maritime Academy
coursesText: GP Rating (pre-sea), pre-sea rating courses (see tn.gov.in/tnma/courses.htm)
notes: Government of Tamil Nadu academy established 1998, Thoothukudi. DGS-approved. Government-hosted site.

name: Plutus Institute of Marine Science
coursesText: Marine Engineering, Naval Architecture, Nautical Science, GP Rating, STCW/crowd management modular courses
notes: Established 2017, Vanur (near Auroville/JIPMER, Villupuram). DGS-approved.

name: Commander Ali's Academy of Merchant Navy
coursesText: GP Rating (pre-sea), Certificate Course in Maritime Catering (CCMC), Australian Deck Cadets Course, Liberian Deck/Engine Watch Rating Course, Basic & Advanced STCW Modular Courses, Post-Sea training
notes: CAAMN, near Toopran, Medak District (Hyderabad area), Telangana. DGS (India) and AMSA (Australia) approved; ISO 9001:2015 certified.

name: Centre For Maritime Training Agra
coursesText: STCW Basic Safety/Survival courses, Refresher & Updating Courses, Competency Courses
notes: MTI 103033. Launched 2025 as Agra branch of CMT Noida; focuses on STCW, refresher and competency (post-sea) courses.

name: Navigator Maritime Academy
coursesText: STCW Basic Safety Training (BST), PSSR, EFA; DG Shipping approved pre-medical examinations, ILO/MLC 2006 and flag-state medicals
notes: MTI 108025. DGS approval status listed as Suspended in source data; website was live at time of search.

name: Northern Maritime Training College
coursesText: Pre-sea and Post-sea courses, Offshore courses (HLO, BOSIET, HLA), Crane Operator training, Vanuatu/Samoa approved courses, value-added courses
notes: MTI 198011, DGS approval Expired. Site is HTTP-only (no SSL) and appears dated; some content may be stale.

name: International Maritime Institute
coursesText: Pre-sea: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS), B.Tech Marine Engineering, Graduate Marine Engineering (GME); Post-sea competency courses; STCW/modular and value-added courses; IMU-CET coaching
notes: MTI 101004. Graded A1 (Outstanding); affiliated with IMU Chennai, UGC and DGS approved.

name: Latin Indo Marine Academy
coursesText: STCW Basic Safety Training (BST) and modular safety/survival courses (survival, fire-fighting, first-aid, security)
notes: MTI 108034. Located at Knowledge Park III, Greater Noida.

name: Shri Mahavir Marine Educational Trust
coursesText: Deck and Engineering pre-sea courses, IMU-CET & pre-sea training guidance; STCW safety courses
notes: MTI 198002, DGS approval Expired. Associated sites (shrimahavirmaritime.com / indiamerchantnavy.in) read more like a counseling/agent operation; institute-specific DGS course listing uncertain.

name: Rajaram Mahavidyalay Institute of Marine Engineering
coursesText: Graduate Marine Engineering (GME) and marine engineering pre-sea training (STCW-aligned)
notes: MTI 106028. Located in Jaunpur, UP. Detailed per-course list not fully confirmed from official site.

name: Amer Maritime Training Academy
coursesText: STCW Basic modular: Fire Prevention & Fire Fighting (FPFF), Personal Survival Techniques (PST), Elementary First Aid (EFA), Personal Safety & Social Responsibility (PSSR); Refresher PST & FPFF; Security Training for Seafarers with Designated Security Duties (STSDSD)
notes: MTI 110021. Site is HTTP-only. Promoted by Amer Ship Owner & Rig Owners Association; ISO 9001:2015 certified.

name: Centre for Maritime Education And Training
coursesText: 53 DGS-approved courses incl. Pre-Sea and Post-Sea training, Competency courses, Basic (STCW modular) courses, Refresher courses
notes: MTI 101003. Founded 1999; graded A1 (Outstanding) by Lloyd's Register; ISO 9001:2015. Also uses cmetlkw.com.

name: HSNA Maritime Education And Research
coursesText: STCW modular safety courses, Refresher/Updating courses, competency and value-added courses (Pre-Sea, Post-Sea and Modular)
notes: MTI 103008 (Lucknow branch). Graded A1 (Outstanding) by Lloyd's Register; ISO 9001:2015. Group site: hsnamaritime.com.

name: Institute of Marine Education And Research Lucknow
coursesText: Advanced Fire Fighting (AFF), Advanced Training for Chemical Tanker Cargo Operations (CHEMCO), Advanced Training for Oil Tanker Cargo Operations (TASCO), Basic Training for Oil & Chemical Tanker Cargo Operations (BTOCTO), Ship Security Officer (SSO), Medical Care (MEDICARE), Medical First Aid (MFA), and other STCW modular/security courses
notes: MTI 105014. Part of IMER Group (imergroup.in); Lucknow campus.

name: Samudra Gyan Marine Academy
coursesText: STCW Basic Safety Training, Security Training (STSDSD), Oil & Chemical Tanker operations training, Fire-fighting courses and other DG Shipping approved modular courses
notes: MTI 104027. Located at Vinay Khand, Gomti Nagar, Lucknow.

name: HSNA Maritime Education & Research -Mahona
coursesText: Pre-sea (e.g. GP Rating) and STCW modular safety courses; competency and value-added courses
notes: MTI 203066 (Mahona campus). Site domain is hsnamermumbai.com despite Mahona/UP location. 4-acre residential campus.

name: J.Sons Merchant Navy Institute
coursesText: Pre-Sea Training for GP Rating; Basic STCW modular courses (PST, FPFF, EFA, PSSR)
notes: MTI 102006. Established 2003; located on Garh Road, Meerut.

name: Centre For Maritime Training Noida
coursesText: STCW Basic Modular courses (BST, STSDSD), Advanced Tanker Training (TASCO, CHEMCO, GASCO), competency and specialization courses; seafarer assessment/examination/certification
notes: MTI 105023. Located C-5 Sector 1, Noida; parent of CMT Agra.

name: Fosma Maritime Institute & Research Organisation
coursesText: ~17 post-sea Competency & Preparatory courses (Second Mate, Chief Mate, ASM), Simulator courses (ARPA, RANSCO, ROC, ECDIS, SMS), Modular & Refresher courses, Medical courses for Nautical and Engineering disciplines
notes: MTI 103007. Website fosma.net covers the FOSMA group; Noida centre at Sector-59.

name: Hoon Maritime Institute Noida
coursesText: 13 DGS-approved courses (STCW modular safety, refresher and value-added courses)
notes: MTI 105031. Located Sector 62, Noida. Same group also runs a Kolkata centre.

name: Asha International Institute of Marine Technology
coursesText: MEO Class II (4 months), High Voltage Safety & Switch Gear (Operational/Management), Deck Officer Revalidation (Operational/Management), ROC, ARPA, RANSCO, MEDICARE and other simulator/modular courses
notes: MTI 101002. Grade A1 (Outstanding). 10-acre campus near LBS Airport, Babatpur, Varanasi.

name: Oceanic Maritime Academy
coursesText: Pre-sea 6-month GP Rating Course; STCW Basic Safety/Survival courses (DG-approved safety & survival training)
notes: MTI 106017. Only institute in Uttarakhand offering pre-sea GP Rating (per its own claim). ISO 9001:2015 certified.

name: Shivalik Maritime Academy
coursesText: STCW modular: Personal Survival Techniques (PST), Fire Prevention & Fire Fighting (FPFF), Elementary First Aid (EFA), Personal Safety & Social Responsibility (PSSR); Basic Safety Training (BST) and STSDSD
notes: MTI 107029. Shimla Bypass Road, Dehradun.

name: Zasha Institute of Maritime Studies
coursesText: Basic STCW modular (PST, FPFF, EFA, PSSR), Medical First Aid (MFA), Medical Care; Advanced modular (TASCO, CHEMCO, High Voltage Safety & Switch Gear); MEO Class II Preparatory; Revalidation, Competency and Value-Added courses
notes: MTI 105016. Unit of Zasha Education & Research Foundation; shares zashamaritime.in with the related Zasha entity (MTI 103032) - the two Zasha listings appear to be run by the same foundation, so the site does not clearly separate them.

name: Zasha Maritime Education And Research
coursesText: Basic & Advanced STCW modular courses (EFA, FPFF, PST, PSSR, MFA, Medical Care), Competency, Revalidation & Upgradation courses, value-added courses
notes: MTI 103032. Same Zasha Education & Research Foundation and website (zashamaritime.in) as MTI 105016; uncertain which specific courses map to this DGS code vs the sister listing.

name: Maritime Education Training And Research Institute
coursesText: Pre-Sea GP Rating (Deck/Engine), Certificate Course in Maritime Catering
notes: MTI 302006 (METRI). Campus at Falta on the Hooghly, South 24 Parganas, West Bengal. Site is HTTP-only and somewhat dated.

name: Trident College of Marine Technology
coursesText: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS), B.Sc Nautical Science, Marine Engineering, GP Rating (General Purpose Rating)
notes: Located at Pailan, near IIM Joka (South 24 Parganas), Kolkata - matches DGS code 312020. An alternate admissions domain tridentcmte.com is also referenced; tcmtindia.com appears to be the primary official site.

name: Seacom Skills University
coursesText: B.Tech Marine Engineering, B.Sc Nautical Science, M.Tech-Ph.D (Marine Engineering) Integrated (plus non-maritime programs in Engineering, Pharmacy, Agriculture, etc.)
notes: Private 'Skills University' in Bolpur, Birbhum. DGS approval status listed as Expired (code 398056). Maritime programs offered but DGS pre-sea approval appears lapsed.

name: Haldia Institute of Maritime Studies & Research
coursesText: B.Sc Nautical Science, B.Sc Culinary Science, B.Sc Hospitality & Hotel Administration, BBA in Insurance Risk Management
notes: Affiliated to Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology. Homepage himsar.net reportedly showed a domain-expiry notice at time of search - site may be intermittently down/uncertain.

name: Seacom Marine College, Howrah
coursesText: B.Tech Marine Engineering, B.Sc Nautical Science, MBA Port & Logistics Management, GP Rating, ETO (Electro-Technical Officer), CCMC (Certificate Course in Maritime Catering), Diploma in Hotel Hospitality & Cruise Line Management (CLM), GMDSS/Radio Telephony exam centre, Second Mate Function courses
notes: DGS code 301003. Campus at Jaladhulagori, Andul-Mouri, Sankrail, Howrah. LMS at lms.seacommarine.org lists MTI No 301003.

name: College of Maritime Studies And Research
coursesText: Not found
notes: DGS code 307019. Located at 48/16A Near Swiss Park, Tollygunge, Kolkata 700033. Confirmed DGS-approved via aggregators/DGS listing but no independent official website or course list found.

name: Fosma Maritime Institute & Research Organisation (Kol)
coursesText: Post-sea competency courses: Second Mate (FG), Chief Mate (FG) Phase I & II, Master (FG) ASM, MEO Class I, MEO Class II; ATOTCO (Advanced Training for Oil Tanker Cargo Operations); Full Mission Simulator courses (Navigation, Liquid Cargo & Ballast Handling, Engine Room Operations & Management); ~35 modular/simulator courses
notes: DGS code 305018. Kolkata centre at Godrej Waterside, Salt Lake Sector V. Kolkata course schedule PDFs hosted on fosma.net. Graded A1 by DNV-GL.

name: Garden Reach Ship Builders & Engineers Ltd
coursesText: Graduate Marine Engineering / Trainee Marine Engineer pre-sea training (1-year DGS-approved course for Mechanical/Marine/Naval Architecture graduates, followed by shipboard training) at GRSE Technical Training Centre
notes: DGS code 314022. GRSE is a defence shipyard; its Technical Training Centre in Kolkata runs the DGS-approved marine engineer training. Website is corporate (grse.in); training details in brochure PDF on the site.

name: Hoon Maritime Institute
coursesText: MEO Class II; STCW courses: Fire Prevention & Fire Fighting (FPFF) and Refresher, Personal Survival Techniques (PST) and Refresher, Basic Training for Liquefied Gas Tanker Cargo Operations, Security Training for Seafarers with Designated Security Duties (STSDSD)
notes: DGS code 303008 (Active). Also uses domain hmikolkata.com. Address: New Taratala Road, Kolkata 700088.

name: IMU, Kolkata Campus
coursesText: B.Tech Marine Engineering, M.Tech Marine Technology, MBA Port & Shipping Management
notes: DGS code 301001. Indian Maritime University Kolkata Campus (formerly MERI Kolkata). Campus-specific site imukolkata.edu.in also exists; admission via IMU CET.

name: Indian Institute of Port Management (IMU Kolkata)
coursesText: PG Diploma in Logistics & Supply Chain Management, PG Diploma in Port & Shipping Management; DGS-approved post-sea/modular courses (Deck Officer Watchkeeping, Basic & Advanced Fire Fighting, Personal Survival, Radar Observer & Plotting, ARPA & GMDSS Simulator) run in collaboration with FOSMA
notes: DGS code 303009. IIPM was merged into Indian Maritime University w.e.f. 01.04.2009 and is now IMU Kolkata Campus; no longer an independent website.

name: Marine Education Charitable Trust (Extended Campus)
coursesText: DGS-approved MEO (Marine Engineer Officer) competency courses, simulator-based courses, and management-level programs (STCW-compliant)
notes: DGS code 303012 (Extended Campus). Same organisation as sno 219 (MECT). Also uses domain mectkolkata.com. Address: Diamond Harbour Rd, Behala, Kolkata 700034. Graded A1 by IRS.

name: Marine Educational Charitable Trust
coursesText: DGS-approved MEO (Marine Engineer Officer) competency courses, simulator-based courses, and management-level programs (STCW-compliant)
notes: DGS code 303011 (main). Founded Nov 2000 by marine engineers. ISO 9001:2015, graded A1 by IRS. Website also mectkolkata.com.

name: Maritime Academy of India
coursesText: STCW pre-sea safety courses: Elementary First Aid (EFA), Fire Prevention & Fire Fighting (FPFF), Personal Safety & Social Responsibilities (PSSR), Personal Survival Techniques (PST); merchant navy courses with hostel facilities
notes: DGS code 302005. Run jointly with Nabik Griha Samity. Address: Nabik Griha, Diamond Harbour Road, Sahpur, Kolkata 700038.

name: Mercantile Marine Academy
coursesText: 22 DGS-approved STCW courses ranging from basic safety training to management-level competency modules (STCW modular/refresher courses)
notes: DGS code 303013. Established 1998, Kolkata. Also uses domains mma-stcw.org and mercantilemarineacademy.com. Specific full course list not enumerated on search results but described as 22 STCW courses.

name: SEI Educational Trust
coursesText: 30+ DGS-approved courses including ECDIS, STCW safety (basic/advanced fire fighting), tanker familiarization & operations courses, and other modular maritime training
notes: DGS code 303014. Established 1999. Kolkata campus at BBT Road, Sarkarpool (700143); also has Faridabad campus.

name: Seacom Marine College
coursesText: Pre-sea courses: GP Rating (General Purpose Rating), ETO (Electro-Technical Officer), CCMC (Certificate Course in Maritime Catering)
notes: DGS code 301002 (Kolkata unit, distinct from Howrah 301003). Established 1989. Address: 11 Kendua Main Road, Garia, Kolkata 700084.

name: Sensea Maritime Academy
coursesText: DGS-approved STCW and modular courses including ECDIS and GMDSS; conducts full range of DG Shipping approved competency/modular courses
notes: DGS code 303016 (Active). ClassNK accredited, ISO 9001:2015. Address: Rampur, Maheshtala, BBT Road, Kolkata 700141. Also uses sensea.in.

name: Sensea Maritime Academy
coursesText: DGS-approved STCW and modular courses including ECDIS and GMDSS (same institute as sno 224)
notes: DGS code 303015 marked Expired - appears to be a superseded/duplicate approval code for the same Sensea Maritime Academy (active approval is 303016).

name: The Institute of Marine Engineers (India), Kolkata
coursesText: DGS-approved competency and modular courses: MEO Class III (NCV - Chief Engineer Officer), MEO Class III (NCV - Second Engineer Officer) Part A & B, MEO Class IV (NCV), Diesel Engine Gas Combustion Simulator course, and other refresher/modular courses
notes: DGS code 307030. IME(I) is a national professional body (HQ Navi Mumbai) with a Kolkata branch/centre. Course list shown is the IME(I) network offering; Kolkata-branch-specific schedule not separately confirmed.

name: The Neotia University
coursesText: B.Tech Marine Engineering (incl. Lateral entry), B.Sc Nautical Science (DGS/STCW-compliant syllabus)
notes: DGS code 314024. Located at Sarisa, Diamond Harbour Rd area (South 24 Parganas / Kolkata). Has in-campus 4000 BHP ship engine training facility.
